# BTC War

> A real-time Bitcoin order-book visualization that maps Binance BTC/USDT market depth and trade flow onto a live 3D battlefield.

## Primary
- [BTC War live experience](https://btcwar.net/)
- [Public project overview](https://vibewhip.github.io/btc-war/)
- [BTC price today, volume, and market depth guide](https://vibewhip.github.io/btc-war/btc-price-today-volume-market-depth/)
- [Bitcoin price, market depth, and order flow glossary](https://vibewhip.github.io/btc-war/bitcoin-price-market-depth-order-flow/)
- [How live crypto order flow drives six 3D battlefields](https://vibewhip.github.io/btc-war/crypto-order-flow-six-3d-battlefields/)

## Machine-readable discovery
- [Expanded BTC War machine guide](https://vibewhip.github.io/btc-war/llms-full.txt)
- [GitHub Pages sitemap](https://vibewhip.github.io/btc-war/sitemap.xml)
- [GitHub Pages Atom feed](https://vibewhip.github.io/btc-war/feed.xml)
- [GitHub Pages RSS feed](https://vibewhip.github.io/btc-war/rss.xml)
- [GitHub Pages JSON Feed](https://vibewhip.github.io/btc-war/feed.json)
- [GitHub Pages JSON-LD entity graph](https://vibewhip.github.io/btc-war/about.jsonld)
- [BTC War sitemap](https://btcwar.net/sitemap.xml)
- [BTC War robots policy](https://btcwar.net/robots.txt)
- [BTC War LLM guide](https://btcwar.net/llms.txt)

## Scope
BTC War is an informational market visualization. It does not execute trades, custody funds, or provide financial advice.
